title: baccharis pilularis var. typica
intro: Baccharis pilularis var. typica, also known as Coyote Brush, is a shrub native to the coastal regions of western North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Baccharis pilularis var. typica include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Baccharis pilularis var. typica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine as a topical application to treat skin conditions.
